description: Developer → App → User hierarchy. Top developers, apps, BYOP metrics, and spending trends.

panels.description: Total developers and API keys active in the selected period.

targets.rawSql: SELECT countDistinct(ak.user_id) as developers FROM d1_apikey ak WHERE ak.name IN (SELECT DISTINCT api_key_name FROM generation_event WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time) AND environment = 'production' AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300 AND total_price > 0 AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58')))

WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT countDistinct(api_key_name) as keys FROM generation_event WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time) AND environment = 'production' AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300 AND total_price > 0 AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND length(api_key_name) > 0 AND api_key_name != 'undefined' AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: Platform

panels.description: Total tier (subsidy cost) and pack (revenue) pollen across all API keys in the selected period.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT sumIf(total_price, selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:tier', 'local:tier')) as tier FROM generation_event WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time) AND environment = 'production' AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300 AND total_price > 0 AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND length(api_key_name) > 0 AND api_key_name != 'undefined' AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT sumIf(total_price, selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:pack', 'local:pack')) as pack FROM generation_event WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time) AND environment = 'production' AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300 AND total_price > 0 AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND length(api_key_name) > 0 AND api_key_name != 'undefined' AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: Platform Pollen

panels.description: Registered BYOP apps with verified redirect-auth flow — developers, apps, and end users in the selected period.

targets.rawSql: SELECT countDistinct(ak.user_id) as devs FROM d1_apikey ak WHERE JSONExtractString(ak.metadata, 'keyType') = 'publishable' AND ak.name IN (SELECT DISTINCT api_key_created_for_app FROM generation_event WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time) AND environment = 'production' AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300 AND total_price > 0 AND api_key_created_via = 'redirect-auth' AND api_key_created_for_app != 'undefined' AND api_key_created_for_app != '' AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58')))

WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT countDistinct(api_key_created_for_app) as apps FROM generation_event WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time) AND environment = 'production' AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300 AND total_price > 0 AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND api_key_created_via = 'redirect-auth' AND api_key_created_for_app != 'undefined' AND api_key_created_for_app != '' AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT countDistinct(user_github_id) as users FROM generation_event WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time) AND environment = 'production' AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300 AND total_price > 0 AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND api_key_created_via = 'redirect-auth' AND user_github_id != '' AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: BYOP (clean)

panels.description: Tier (subsidy) and pack (revenue) pollen flowing through registered BYOP apps.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT sumIf(total_price, selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:tier', 'local:tier')) as tier FROM generation_event WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time) AND environment = 'production' AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300 AND total_price > 0 AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND api_key_created_via = 'redirect-auth' AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT sumIf(total_price, selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:pack', 'local:pack')) as pack FROM generation_event WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time) AND environment = 'production' AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300 AND total_price > 0 AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND api_key_created_via = 'redirect-auth' AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: BYOP Pollen (clean)

panels.description: Heuristic BYOP apps (hostname detection) — developers and apps in the selected period.

targets.rawSql: SELECT countDistinct(ak.user_id) as devs FROM d1_apikey ak WHERE ak.name IN (SELECT DISTINCT api_key_name FROM generation_event WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time) AND environment = 'production' AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300 AND total_price > 0 AND api_key_created_via != 'redirect-auth' AND api_key_type = 'secret' AND api_key_name LIKE '%.%' AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58')))

WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT countDistinct(api_key_name) as apps FROM generation_event WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time) AND environment = 'production' AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300 AND total_price > 0 AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND api_key_created_via != 'redirect-auth' AND api_key_type = 'secret' AND api_key_name LIKE '%.%' AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: BYOP (heuristic)

panels.description: Tier and pack pollen flowing through heuristic BYOP apps.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT sumIf(total_price, selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:tier', 'local:tier')) as tier FROM generation_event WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time) AND environment = 'production' AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300 AND total_price > 0 AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND api_key_created_via != 'redirect-auth' AND api_key_type = 'secret' AND api_key_name LIKE '%.%' AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT sumIf(total_price, selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:pack', 'local:pack')) as pack FROM generation_event WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time) AND environment = 'production' AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300 AND total_price > 0 AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND api_key_created_via != 'redirect-auth' AND api_key_type = 'secret' AND api_key_name LIKE '%.%' AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: BYOP Pollen (heuristic)

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username
),
key_owners AS (
  SELECT
    du.github_username,
    toUInt32(countIf(JSONExtractString(ak.metadata, 'keyType') = 'secret' OR JSONExtractString(ak.metadata, 'keyType') = '')) as secret_keys,
    toUInt32(countIf(JSONExtractString(ak.metadata, 'keyType') = 'publishable' AND JSONExtractString(ak.metadata, 'appUrl') = '')) as pub_keys,
    toUInt32(countIf(JSONExtractString(ak.metadata, 'keyType') = 'publishable' AND JSONExtractString(ak.metadata, 'appUrl') != '')) as app_keys
  FROM d1_apikey ak
  LEFT JOIN d1_user du ON ak.user_id = du.id
  WHERE du.github_username != '' AND du.github_username != 'undefined'
  GROUP BY du.github_username
)
SELECT
  developer,
  total_pollen,
  tier_pollen,
  pack_pollen,
  requests,
  ifNull(ko.secret_keys, 0) as sk,
  ifNull(ko.pub_keys, 0) as pk,
  ifNull(ko.app_keys, 0) as app_key
FROM (
  SELECT
    if(user_github_username != '' AND user_github_username != 'undefined', user_github_username, user_github_id) as developer,
    sumIf(total_price, selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:tier', 'local:tier')) as tier_pollen,
    sumIf(total_price, selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:pack', 'local:pack')) as pack_pollen,
    sum(total_price) as total_pollen,
    count() as requests
  FROM generation_event
  WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
    AND environment = 'production'
    AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
    AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
    AND total_price > 0
    AND length(api_key_name) > 0 AND api_key_name != 'undefined'
    AND user_github_id != ''
    AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
  GROUP BY developer
  ORDER BY total_pollen DESC
  LIMIT 500
) dev
LEFT JOIN key_owners ko ON dev.developer = ko.github_username

panels.title: Developer Ranking
panels.description: All API key users ranked by total pollen consumed. Shows how many keys they use and the tier/pack split. For BYOP-specific developer views, see the Registered and Heuristic BYOP tables below.

Apps using the proper BYOP authorize flow (redirect-auth) with verified app attribution. Developer is resolved directly from api_key_created_for_user_id — no name-matching fallbacks. This is the gold-standard data.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username
  FROM d1_user
  WHERE banned = 1
  GROUP BY github_username
),
owner_direct AS (
  SELECT id AS user_id, github_username
  FROM d1_user
  WHERE github_username != '' AND github_username != 'undefined'
),
owner_fallback AS (
  SELECT ak.name as app_name, du.github_username as owner
  FROM d1_apikey ak
  LEFT JOIN d1_user du ON ak.user_id = du.id
  WHERE JSONExtractString(ak.metadata, 'keyType') = 'publishable'
    AND du.github_username != '' AND du.github_username != 'undefined'
)
SELECT
  app,
  owner,
  total_pollen,
  if(tier_pollen + pack_pollen > 0, (pack_pollen - tier_pollen) / (pack_pollen + tier_pollen), 0) as profitability,
  tier_pollen,
  pack_pollen,
  users,
  requests
FROM (
  SELECT
    app,
    multiIf(
      any(direct.github_username) != '' AND any(direct.github_username) IS NOT NULL, any(direct.github_username),
      any(fb.owner) != '' AND any(fb.owner) IS NOT NULL, any(fb.owner),
      ''
    ) as owner,
    count() as users,
    sum(tier_pollen) as tier_pollen,
    sum(pack_pollen) as pack_pollen,
    sum(user_total) as total_pollen,
    sum(requests) as requests
  FROM (
    SELECT
      api_key_created_for_app as app,
      if(user_github_username != '' AND user_github_username != 'undefined', user_github_username, user_github_id) as user,
      sumIf(total_price, selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:tier', 'local:tier')) as tier_pollen,
      sumIf(total_price, selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:pack', 'local:pack')) as pack_pollen,
      sum(total_price) as user_total,
      count() as requests,
      any(api_key_created_for_user_id) as owner_user_id
    FROM generation_event
    WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
      AND environment = 'production'
      AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
      AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
      AND total_price > 0
      AND api_key_created_via = 'redirect-auth'
      AND api_key_created_for_app != 'undefined'
      AND api_key_created_for_app != ''
      AND user_github_id != ''
      AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
    GROUP BY app, user
  ) AS per_user
  LEFT JOIN owner_direct direct ON per_user.owner_user_id = direct.user_id
  LEFT JOIN owner_fallback fb ON per_user.app = fb.app_name
  GROUP BY app
  ORDER BY total_pollen DESC
)

panels.title: Registered BYOP Apps

panels.description: Apps detected via hostname heuristic (secret API key with a dot in the name, e.g. "myapp.com"). Developer attribution is best-effort via d1_apikey name lookup. Less reliable than registered BYOP apps but still useful.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username
  FROM d1_user
  WHERE banned = 1
  GROUP BY github_username
),
owner_clean AS (
  SELECT
    id AS user_id,
    github_username
  FROM d1_user
  WHERE github_username != '' AND github_username != 'undefined'
),
owner_fallback AS (
  SELECT
    name AS app_name,
    user_id
  FROM d1_apikey
  WHERE JSONExtractString(metadata, 'keyType') = 'publishable'
)
SELECT
  app,
  owner,
  total_pollen,
  if(tier_pollen + pack_pollen > 0, (pack_pollen - tier_pollen) / (pack_pollen + tier_pollen), 0) as profitability,
  tier_pollen,
  pack_pollen,
  users,
  requests
FROM (
  SELECT
    app,
    any(resolved_owner) as owner,
    count() as users,
    sum(tier_pollen) as tier_pollen,
    sum(pack_pollen) as pack_pollen,
    sum(user_total) as total_pollen,
    sum(requests) as requests
  FROM (
    SELECT
      if(api_key_created_for_app != 'undefined', api_key_created_for_app, api_key_name) as app,
      if(user_github_username != '' AND user_github_username != 'undefined', user_github_username, user_github_id) as user,
      sumIf(total_price, selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:tier', 'local:tier')) as tier_pollen,
      sumIf(total_price, selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:pack', 'local:pack')) as pack_pollen,
      sum(total_price) as user_total,
      count() as requests,
      any(api_key_created_for_user_id) as owner_user_id
    FROM generation_event
    WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
      AND environment = 'production'
      AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
      AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
      AND total_price > 0
      AND api_key_created_via != 'redirect-auth' AND api_key_type = 'secret' AND api_key_name LIKE '%.%'
      AND user_github_id != ''
      AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
    GROUP BY app, user
  ) AS per_user
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
      app,
      multiIf(
        clean.github_username != '' AND clean.github_username IS NOT NULL, clean.github_username,
        fallback_user.github_username != '' AND fallback_user.github_username IS NOT NULL, fallback_user.github_username,
        ''
      ) as resolved_owner
    FROM (
      SELECT DISTINCT
        if(api_key_created_for_app != 'undefined', api_key_created_for_app, api_key_name) as app,
        any(api_key_created_for_user_id) as owner_user_id
      FROM generation_event
      WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
        AND environment = 'production'
        AND api_key_created_via != 'redirect-auth' AND api_key_type = 'secret' AND api_key_name LIKE '%.%'
      GROUP BY app
    ) AS apps
    LEFT JOIN owner_clean AS clean ON apps.owner_user_id = clean.user_id
    LEFT JOIN owner_fallback AS fb ON apps.app = fb.app_name
    LEFT JOIN owner_clean AS fallback_user ON fb.user_id = fallback_user.user_id
  ) AS owners ON per_user.app = owners.app
  GROUP BY app
  ORDER BY total_pollen DESC
)

panels.title: Heuristic BYOP Apps

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username
),
key_owners AS (
  SELECT ak.name as key_name, du.github_username as owner
  FROM d1_apikey ak
  LEFT JOIN d1_user du ON ak.user_id = du.id
  WHERE du.github_username != '' AND du.github_username != 'undefined'
)
SELECT
  app,
  owner,
  total_pollen,
  if(pack_pollen + tier_pollen > 0, (pack_pollen - tier_pollen) / (pack_pollen + tier_pollen), 0) as profitability,
  tier_pollen,
  pack_pollen,
  is_byop,
  users,
  requests
FROM (
  SELECT
    if(api_key_created_for_app != 'undefined' AND api_key_created_for_app != '', api_key_created_for_app, api_key_name) as app,
    any(ko.owner) as owner,
    if(countIf(api_key_created_via = 'redirect-auth' AND api_key_created_for_app != 'undefined' AND api_key_created_for_app != '') > 0, 'clean',
      if(countIf(api_key_created_via != 'redirect-auth' AND api_key_type = 'secret' AND api_key_name LIKE '%.%') > 0, 'heuristic', 'no')
    ) as is_byop,
    countDistinct(user_github_id) as users,
    sumIf(total_price, selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:tier', 'local:tier')) as tier_pollen,
    sumIf(total_price, selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:pack', 'local:pack')) as pack_pollen,
    sum(total_price) as total_pollen,
    count() as requests
  FROM generation_event
  LEFT JOIN key_owners ko ON if(api_key_created_for_app != 'undefined' AND api_key_created_for_app != '', api_key_created_for_app, api_key_name) = ko.key_name
  WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
    AND environment = 'production'
    AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
    AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
    AND total_price > 0
    AND length(api_key_name) > 0 AND api_key_name != 'undefined'
    AND user_github_id != ''
    AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
  GROUP BY app
  ORDER BY total_pollen DESC
  LIMIT 200
)

panels.title: API Key Ranking
panels.description: All API keys ranked by pollen consumption — includes everything. Useful for discovering apps that should register for BYOP. Key names are whatever developers chose when creating their keys.
Daily BYOP share of total platform pollen (green) and users (blue). Shows whether the BYOP ecosystem is growing relative to the whole platform. Rising trends mean more self-sustaining economics.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(start_time, INTERVAL 1 DAY) as time,
  sumIf(total_price, api_key_created_via = 'redirect-auth' OR (api_key_type = 'secret' AND api_key_name LIKE '%.%')) / if(sum(total_price) > 0, sum(total_price), 1) as byop_pollen_pct,
  uniqIf(user_github_id, (api_key_created_via = 'redirect-auth' OR (api_key_type = 'secret' AND api_key_name LIKE '%.%')) AND user_github_id != '' AND user_github_id != 'undefined') / if(uniqIf(user_github_id, user_github_id != '' AND user_github_id != 'undefined') > 0, uniqIf(user_github_id, user_github_id != '' AND user_github_id != 'undefined'), 1) as byop_user_pct
FROM generation_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND total_price > 0
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

panels.title: BYOP Share of Platform

panels.description: Daily count of distinct active BYOP apps, split by detection method. Clean = verified redirect-auth flow with app key attribution. Heuristic = detected via hostname pattern in secret key name. Shows the growth of the registered app ecosystem vs legacy hostname detection.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(start_time, INTERVAL 1 DAY) as time,
  uniqIf(api_key_created_for_app, api_key_created_via = 'redirect-auth' AND api_key_created_for_app != 'undefined' AND api_key_created_for_app != '') as clean_apps,
  uniqIf(api_key_name, api_key_created_via != 'redirect-auth' AND api_key_type = 'secret' AND api_key_name LIKE '%.%') as heuristic_apps
FROM generation_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND total_price > 0
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Daily Active BYOP Apps — Clean vs Heuristic

panels.description: Daily BYOP request volume split by detection method. Clean = verified redirect-auth flow. Heuristic = hostname pattern. Shows the shift in request volume from heuristic to clean signal over time.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(start_time, INTERVAL 1 DAY) as time,
  countIf(api_key_created_via = 'redirect-auth') as clean_requests,
  countIf(api_key_created_via != 'redirect-auth' AND api_key_type = 'secret' AND api_key_name LIKE '%.%') as heuristic_requests,
  if(clean_requests + heuristic_requests > 0, clean_requests / (clean_requests + heuristic_requests), 0) as clean_pct
FROM generation_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND (api_key_created_via = 'redirect-auth' OR (api_key_type = 'secret' AND api_key_name LIKE '%.%'))
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Daily BYOP Requests — Clean vs Heuristic

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(start_time, INTERVAL 1 DAY) as time,
  sumIf(total_price, selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:pack', 'local:pack')) as pack_pollen,
  sumIf(total_price, selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:tier', 'local:tier')) as tier_pollen,
  if(pack_pollen + tier_pollen > 0, pack_pollen / (pack_pollen + tier_pollen), 0) as pack_pct
FROM generation_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time) AND environment = 'production' AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND total_price > 0
AND (api_key_created_via = 'redirect-auth' OR (api_key_type = 'secret' AND api_key_name LIKE '%.%'))
AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Daily BYOP Pack vs Tier
panels.description: Daily BYOP pollen split by Pack (green, paid by end users) and Tier (orange, subsidized). The red line shows what percentage of BYOP pollen comes from free-tier subsidy — lower is better for economics.

targets.rawSql:
WITH pk_owners AS (SELECT name AS app_name, user_id FROM d1_apikey WHERE JSONExtractString(metadata, 'keyType') = 'publishable')
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(start_time, INTERVAL 1 DAY) as time,
  uniq(user_github_id) as byop_users,
  uniq(if(api_key_created_for_app != 'undefined' AND api_key_created_for_app != '', api_key_created_for_app, api_key_name)) as byop_apps,
  uniq(pk.user_id) as byop_devs
FROM generation_event
LEFT JOIN pk_owners AS pk ON if(api_key_created_for_app != 'undefined' AND api_key_created_for_app != '', api_key_created_for_app, api_key_name) = pk.app_name
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time) AND environment = 'production' AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
AND total_price > 0 AND user_github_id != '' AND user_github_id != 'undefined'
AND (api_key_created_via = 'redirect-auth' OR (api_key_type = 'secret' AND api_key_name LIKE '%.%'))
AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Daily BYOP Users, Apps & Devs
panels.description: Daily count of active BYOP end users, apps, and developers. Shows ecosystem growth and engagement trends over time.

title: App Leaderboard
